patches.beforeValue: Senior backend engineer with over 9 years of experience building and scaling distributed systems in fast-paced, cross-country environments. Known for taking end-to-end ownership of complex projects, from architectural design to deployment and maintenance. Specialized in event-driven and message-queueing systems, asynchronous processing, and creating robust observability tooling.
patches.afterValue: Senior backend engineer with over 9 years of experience designing, building, and scaling complex distributed systems and platforms from the ground up in high-growth environments. Proven ability to take end-to-end ownership, from architectural design to deployment and maintenance, with a strong focus on reducing production risk through robust validation and automation. Specialized in event-driven and message-queueing systems.
patches.reason: Tailored summary to emphasize platform ownership, reliability, and production impact.

patches.beforeValue: Architected and developed a robust AI pipeline processing 10,000+ monthly sales calls using LLMs, Vector Databases, and RAG for advanced data extraction, indexing, and analysis. Integrated with 8+ third-party platforms to enhance cross-system data ingestion, increasing sync reliability by 40%.
patches.afterValue: Architected and redesigned the core platform to an event-driven microservices pattern, significantly improving scalability and reducing latency by 30% to accommodate growing customer demand. Integrated with 8+ third-party platforms, enhancing ingestion and increasing sync reliability by 40%, crucial for maintaining cross-platform consistency.
patches.reason: Reframed responsibility to align with event-driven and scalability requirements.
